paper_title: MedConceptsQA: Open Source Medical Concepts QA Benchmark
evaluation_method: Multiple-choice QA across medical vocabularies (ICD-10, ICD-9 diagnoses, ICD-9-PROC, ICD-10-PROC procedures, ATC drug codes). 800K+ questions at 3 difficulty levels (easy, medium, hard). Balanced datasets so accuracy is the appropriate metric. Zero-shot and 4-shot evaluation. Each test limited to 250 randomly sampled Q&As, repeated 3 times with 95% confidence intervals.
